sentences.arabic: فَتَحَتْ سَلْمَى فِيدِيُو تَعْلِيمِيًّا عَنِ الطَّبْخِ.
sentences.translation: Salma je otvorila edukativni video o kuhanju.
sentences.translationEn: Salma opened an educational video about cooking.

sentences.translation: Gledala je video i zapisivala sastojke.
sentences.translationEn: She watched the video and wrote down the ingredients.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى الْمَطْبَخِ وَطَبَّقَتْ مَا تَعَلَّمَتْهُ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u kuhinju i primijenila ono što je naučila.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the kitchen and applied what she learned.

sentences.translation: Jelo je ispalo lijepo i zahvalila je videu.
sentences.translationEn: The dish turned out beautiful and she thanked the video.
